As one of the top-rated construction companies in Jaipur, we provide end-to-end solutions designed especially for first-time home builders. Whether you're building your first home or investing in a custom-designed dream space, we offer the expertise, systems, and support to make it happen—seamlessly.

No hidden fees. No vague estimates.
With our accurate construction budget calculator, you’ll know the costs involved before you lay the foundation.
From site clearance to final finishing, our experienced team handles it all.

Monitor progress remotely with our 24/7 site camera surveillance.
Stay updated with milestone alerts and periodic reports.

Track labour costs, material invoices, and every other construction-related expense.
You’ll have one expert managing the entire project.
Your project manager ensures timely execution, quality control, and constant communication.
We’re known for completing projects on or before time without compromising quality.
With our streamlined processes and professional construction services, delays become a thing of the past.

p: Building Your First Home? Here’s Everything You Need to Know

​Building your first home is one of the most important milestones in one’s life. Remember the time when you wanted to own a tree house as a kid but never did? But this time, you actually get to fulfil your dreams (adult dreams as we call it). The excitement of knowing you’ll finally have your dream space shouldn’t be cut short by the challenges that come with the journey. With the right guidance, you can navigate the complexities and create a space tailored to your dreams. This comprehensive guide breaks down the process, ensuring you're well-prepared every step of the way.​
Before laying the first brick, meticulous planning is crucial:
Define Your Vision: Determine the size, style, and features you desire.
Set a Budget: Factor in land costs, construction, permits, and a contingency fund.
Research Local Regulations: Understand zoning laws and building codes in your desired area.
Location impacts your daily life and property value:
Accessibility: Proximity to work, schools, and amenities.
Neighborhood Growth: Areas with upcoming developments can increase property value.
Land Assessment: Ensure the plot is suitable for construction, considering soil quality and topography.​
Collaborate with professionals to bring your vision to life:
Architects & Designers: They translate your ideas into feasible plans.
Functionality: Prioritize layouts that suit your lifestyle.
Sustainability: Incorporate energy-efficient designs and materials.
A well-planned budget prevents future financial strain:
Detailed Breakdown: List all expenses, including hidden costs like landscaping or interior furnishings.
Contingency Fund: Allocate 10-15% for unexpected expenses.
Regular Reviews: Monitor expenses to stay on track.
Housing Loans: Contact your bank to inquire about housing loans schemes.
Credit Assessment: Ensure a good credit score for favorable terms.​
Track Spending: Use budgeting tools or apps.
Avoid Over-Customization: Stick to essential features to prevent overspending.
Regular Communication: Maintain open dialogue with your builder about costs.
Your builder is pivotal to the project's success:
Research: Check reviews, past projects, and credentials.
Interviews: Meet multiple builders to find the right fit.
Contracts: Ensure clear terms regarding timelines, costs, and responsibilities.​
Electricians, Plumbers, etc.: Ensure they're licensed and experienced.
Scheduling: Coordinate timelines to prevent delays.
Quality Checks: Regularly inspect work to maintain standards.​
Permits: Obtain necessary approvals before starting.
Inspections: Schedule at various stages to ensure code adherence.
Clearing: Remove debris and level the land.
Foundation: Choose between slab, crawl space, or basement based on soil and design.
Utilities: Install essential services like water and electricity.​
Walls and Roof: Erect the main structure.
Windows and Doors: Install openings for natural light and access.
Sheathing: Add layers for insulation and protection.​
Systems Installation: Set up HVAC, plumbing, and electrical systems.
Insulation and Drywall: Ensure energy efficiency and prepare walls for finishing.
Flooring and Fixtures: Lay down floors and install essential fixtures.​
Painting: Choose colors that reflect your style.
Cabinetry and Countertops: Install kitchen and bathroom essentials.
Landscaping: Enhance curb appeal with plants and pathways.​
Ensure everything is up to par:
Professional Inspections: Confirm all systems function correctly.
Personal Walkthrough: Check for any cosmetic or functional issues.
Punch List: Document items needing correction.​
Utilities Setup: Activate services like internet and electricity.
Address Change: Update your address with relevant institutions.
Maintenance Plan: Schedule regular upkeep tasks.​
Builder's Warranty: Understand coverage duration and scope.
Regular Checks: Inspect for issues like leaks or cracks.
Preventive Measures: Clean gutters, service HVAC systems, and more.​

This all can seem daunting to a first time home-builder. That’s why Reidius Infra was founded- to simplify home-building for everyone. From the very first consultation to the final handover (and even beyond), we simplify the entire process with a structured, transparent, and hands-on approach. Our expert team, real-time tracking tools, and client-first philosophy ensure that every stage—design, budgeting, construction, and maintenance—is handled with clarity and care.
To learn more about our home-building process, download our portfolio here.

/terms-and-conditions.title: Reidius Infra
/terms-and-conditions.description: Architecture & Construction company, based in Jaipur
p: Welcome to Reidius Infra. Please read these Terms and Conditions carefully before requesting our services. By using our services, you agree to be bound by the following Terms and Conditions.
This is a simplified version of our Terms and Conditions. A detailed legal document is available upon request through our communication channels.

We, the Builders, commit to constructing the building on the specified plot of land as per the agreed plans, drawings, layouts, and specifications. The construction will be done using high-quality materials and in a professional manner.

The Owner agrees to pay for the construction services as per the terms outlined in the Onsite app. A minimum balance of ₹2,00,000/- must be maintained. The Builder will commence construction within 15 days of receiving the first instalment and will complete the project within ten months from that date.
The Owner will provide the Builder and their personnel, including subcontractors and employees, unrestricted access to the construction site to perform their duties efficiently.
Design and development of structural drawings, floor plans, and material testing reports.
Schematic development for water, drainage, electrical, and AC systems.
Site management, including inventory and material procurement.
Site supervision and regular audits by senior engineers.
Daily progress reports, 24x7 camera surveillance, and maintenance of site expenses ledger.
Two years of free maintenance for electrical and plumbing work post-completion.
A management fee of 15% of the total construction cost will be charged, with applicable taxes.
This fee will be automatically deducted monthly.
The Builder is not responsible for leftover materials after construction.
No approvals are required for petty expenses to ensure smooth operations.
Construction will follow standard procedures, with no work on certain holidays.
All instructions must be routed through the company; no direct instructions to the contractor or labourers are permitted.
Any additional costs due to work halted by the Owner will be payable by the Owner.
Security costs, if required, will be shared as per mutual agreement.

The Owner or their representative has the right to inspect the construction work and materials at any time without prior notice. Any requested changes should be communicated, and the Builder will be given reasonable time to implement them.
This Agreement commences on the agreed start date and will continue until the completion of the project or earlier termination as specified in Clause 11.
The Builder is responsible for repairing any damage to the Owner's or neighbours' property caused by negligence. Additionally, the Builder is liable for any accidents or loss of labour at the site.
Neither party will be held liable for delays or failure to perform due to unforeseen events beyond their control (Force Majeure).
This Agreement is governed by the laws of India. Any disputes will be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
The Owner agrees not to solicit or hire any employees of the Builder during the term of this Agreement and for one year thereafter.
Each party will bear its own costs in relation to this Agreement and any associated documentation.
In case of a dispute, the parties will attempt to resolve it amicably through negotiation. If unsuccessful, the dispute will be resolved through arbitration in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
The Builder remains an independent contractor. This Agreement does not create a partnership, joint venture, or agency relationship between the parties.
All notices and communications under this Agreement will be in writing and delivered to the designated addresses.
This Agreement will be executed in duplicate, with one copy retained by the Builder and the other by the Owner.

The Owner has the right to discontinue the work if not satisfied with the quality or workmanship, following prior warnings to the Builder.The builder will be given a warning to make improvements. If the quality does not improve, the contractor will be replaced with a more capable team.
If any structural defects, such as leakages or cracks, occur due to poor design or workmanship, the Builder is liable to repair them.
By using our services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.

/privacy-policy.title: Reidius Infra
/privacy-policy.description: Architecture & Construction company, based in Jaipur
p: Reidius Infra ("we," "our," or "us") values your trust and is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you interact with our website and services. By using our website or availing of our services, you agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy.
We may collect the following types of information:
Name, email address, phone number, and address provided during inquiries or consultations.
Financial information such as payment details when processing transactions.
Browser type, IP address, and browsing behaviour through cookies and analytics tools.
Construction project details, including location, plans, and preferences.
We use your information for the following purposes:
To provide and improve our construction and consultancy services.
To communicate with you regarding project updates, billing, and queries.
To send promotional content and offers if you have opted to receive such communications.
To maintain safety compliance and adhere to legal obligations.
We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. However, we may share your information with:
Trusted service providers and partners involved in your project (e.g., architects, engineers).
Regulatory authorities, as required by Indian law.
Third-party vendors for secure payment processing and project management tools.
We implement industry-standard measures to protect your data from unauthorised access, alteration, or disclosure. These include:
Secure servers and encryption for sensitive information.
Regular security audits and compliance checks.
Restricting access to personal information to authorised personnel only.
As a user, you have the following rights concerning your personal data:
Access and update your personal information.
Request deletion of your personal data, subject to legal or contractual obligations.
Opt-out of receiving promotional emails by clicking the "unsubscribe" link in our communications.
To exercise these rights, please contact us at mail@reidiusinfra.com.

Our website uses cookies to enhance user experience and analyse website traffic. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. Note that disabling cookies may affect website functionality.

Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these external sites. We recommend reviewing their privacy policies before providing any personal information.
We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy or comply with legal obligations.
We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page with the updated effective date.
If you have any concerns or complaints regarding your privacy, you may contact our Grievance Officer:
Name: [Insert Grievance Officer Name]Email: [Insert Grievance Officer Email]Phone: [Insert Grievance Officer Phone]
We will acknowledge and address your concerns promptly in accordance with Indian data protection laws.
This Privacy Policy is governed by the laws of India. Any disputes arising from this policy will be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts in Jaipur, Rajasthan.
By using our website or services, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy and agree to its terms.
For further queries, contact us at mail@reidiusinfra.com.

p: REIDIUS INFRA PRIVATE LIMITED, We are an architecture-focused construction company based in Jaipur, offering one-stop solutions for all your home-building needs, its enterprise involved in Architectural design.
Working since 2017 - Aspire to build your dream place.
Milestones that we proudly accomplished as leading construction company

At Reidius Infra, we understand how overwhelming and time consuming the process of home building can be, so we made it our mission to simplify it for you. We offer a one-stop solution for building your dream home.

Our story began in Jaipur, a city known for its grand forts and havelis. Our fascination for the city’s archi-tectural marvels inspired us to build homes owners would take pride in, just like how we pride ourselves on our city’s architectural heritage.
At the heart of Reidius Infra is the value of trust and transparency
The foundation of every relationship we form at reidius is trust.
We deliver what we commit, we strive to stay authentic at all times.
Reiduis holds itself accountable for the decisions and actions.
